services.name: tollbooth-fermyon
services.description: Weather stats Operator on Spin/WASI — the edge port of tollbooth-sample, hosted by the tollbooth-wasmcp SpinOperatorHost. Full DPYC toolset (proof, Secure Courier, Lightning) running in WebAssembly.

notes: Registered via Authority-mediated operator registration protocol. Spin/WASI implementation (tollbooth-wasmcp host); same operator source as tollbooth-sample. URL is the Tailscale funnel during development; intended production endpoint is https://fermyon.tollbooth-dpyc.com/mcp once the Akamai deploy is live.
